subcodes.first_line: We had previously sent unto thee a Book that beareth witness there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Chosen One. Thou didst turn thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا الیک من قبل کتابا یشهد انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المختار انک اقبلت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @living waters; water of life, @call to action, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
